creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Wed, Jun 07, 2000 at 06:53:26AM -0700, rmiya@cc.hirosaki-u.ac.jp wrote:
> begin 644 deft.tar.gz
[...]

PLEASE, PLEASE: Don't do this.  Give a ``diff -urN deft.old deft.new'',
NOT a tarball or a shar of your new version, as the Handbook states!

Because you gave me a tarball, I had to move my CVS checked-out version
to a separate directory, untar your tarball, and do a ``diff -urN
--exclude=CVS deft.old deft.new > deft.diff'' and then apply the diff to
my CVS checked-out version.

Also, your molden port was out of date.  Please make sure you cvsup your
ports before you submit diffs to them.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
